prompt: Execute the ResearchOS corpus_building workflow for GNN_PCNA Phase 2. User explicitly requires using ResearchOS MCP/orchestrator only for this research phase. Do not modify model code, do not retrain, do not generate new scientific claims about project results. Deliverable: create or populate research_context/ with these files: 00_SOURCE_INDEX.csv, 00_SOURCE_INDEX.md, 01_REFERENCE_PROJECTS.md, 02_DATASETS_AND_SPLITS.md, 03_MODEL_ARCHITECTURES.md, 04_EVALUATION_AND_LEAKAGE.md, 05_PCNA_BIOLOGY.md, 06_MD_VALIDATION.md, 07_BASELINES.md, 08_REPRODUCIBILITY_AND_PROVENANCE.md, 09_FAILURE_MODES.md, 10_PHASE2_DESIGN_RULES.md, 11_OPEN_RESEARCH_QUESTIONS.md, 12_MASTER_SYNTHESIS.md. Requirement: gather and synthesize at least 200 high-quality, meaningful, deduplicated sources with provenance fields DOI/URL/authors/year/journal-or-venue/relevance/category/source-kind. Prioritize peer-reviewed papers, benchmark papers, Nature/Science/Cell/PubMed/arXiv ML papers, official datasets, official GitHub re
